summary: Two OQs resolved: WIT @since supported by cargo component 0.21.1 (informational, not enforced); self-signed HS256 is the right path for mint_smoke_token.sh. Main findings: 10 public enums missing #[non_exhaustive] (5 A2UI surface, 5 Kiln/policy surface); docs/api/ directory absent; SDKs at 0.1.0; k6 thresholds aspirational (blocked on live staging); Dockerfile entrypoints are bare binaries. Reorder: G5 before G4 (G5 has no external dep). All changes are additive/small with no regression risk.
key_findings: 10 enums missing #[non_exhaustive]: AgUiEvent, ParseError, ReflectionError, EndpointKind, AssemblerError, Capability, CompilationStrategy, TargetArch, Decision, PolicyLoadError
docs/api/ directory does not exist — needs a2ui.md and kiln-abi.md
@flint/react and flint_genui both at 0.1.0 — bump to 1.0.0
k6 thresholds aspirational — blocked on live staging stack
Dockerfile ENTRYPOINT is bare binary — entrypoint.sh needed
Self-signed HS256 is sufficient for mint_smoke_token.sh
